purpose: Publication asset manifest for the analysis.

primary_classification.description: Animal-level LOAO AUCs and primary tissue-by-model permutation results; exact enumeration for liver and serum.

primary_confidence_intervals.description: Bootstrap AUC confidence intervals used only after cross-checking its AUC rows against the canonical primary classification file; legacy permutation columns are not used.

univariate.description: Canonical animal-level Mann-Whitney/BH summary; breast has 98 significant ions.

sensitivity.description: Exploratory train-unit × model × min_det grid. Raw permutation p values only; do not treat an individual cell as a confirmatory primary result.

stability.description: Fold-wise spot-level stability signature and stricter animal-level core.

transfer.description: Frozen breast-trained model applied to peripheral tissues; a direct transfer endpoint, not a per-tissue classifier.
